name: Easy Cash
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers payday loans ($100-$500) and installment loans ($100-$1,000) with same-day or next-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating a network of physical locations across the United States, including a Miami, FL branch at 14546 W Dixie Hwy. The company specializes in short-term lending products designed to help consumers cover unexpected expenses before their next paycheck. With extended hours (open until 8 PM on Fridays and 6 PM on Saturdays), ACE positions itself as an accessible alternative to traditional banks for fast cash needs.

ACE offers two primary loan products: payday loans ranging from $100-$500 with full repayment due on the next payday, and installment loans from $100-$1,000 with longer repayment terms and equal payment amounts spread over the loan duration. Both products can be accessed online or in-store. Beyond lending, ACE provides a comprehensive suite of money services including check cashing (no bank account required), bill payment for rent and utilities, MoneyGram money transfers to over 200 countries, money orders, ATM services, and tax services. The company also offers prepaid banking products (Porte and Flare accounts) and the ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card, partnering with Pathward, N.A. for banking services.

ACE differentiates itself through its omnichannel approach—combining physical store locations with online application options—and its extended service hours. The company positions convenience and speed as core value propositions, enabling same-day applications and funding. The integration of complementary money services (check cashing, bill pay, money transfers) at the same locations creates a one-stop-shop experience for unbanked and underbanked consumers.

However, as a payday and installment lender, ACE operates in a high-cost lending category. While the website does not disclose APR rates, payday loans and short-term installment products typically carry substantially higher interest rates and fees than traditional personal loans or credit-based alternatives. The business model targets financially vulnerable populations who lack access to conventional credit. Consumers should carefully review all terms, fees, and repayment obligations before borrowing, and consider whether this represents the most cost-effective solution to their financial need.
pros: In-store and online application options for both payday and installment loans
Extended hours including Friday until 8 PM and Saturday until 6 PM for accessibility
No bank account required for check cashing services with valid government-issued ID
Money transfer services to over 200 countries via MoneyGram partnership
Installment loans offer longer repayment terms and equal payments compared to payday loans
Integrated money services (check cashing, bill pay, money orders, ATM access) at same location
Porte and Flare account options with full-service mobile banking apps for account management
cons: Website does not disclose APR rates, fees, or total cost of borrowing—critical terms not transparent
Payday and short-term installment loans typically carry high interest rates and fees compared to traditional lenders
Physical store locations required for payday loan applications (only installment loans available online)
Loan amounts are modest ($100-$1,000 maximum), insufficient for larger financial needs
Target demographic is financially vulnerable consumers with limited access to conventional credit
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate cash for emergency expenses
Individuals without access to traditional credit or bank accounts seeking check cashing services
Workers living paycheck-to-paycheck who need a small bridge loan before their next income deposit
Consumers needing international money transfer services without a traditional bank relationship
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers experiencing immediate financial emergencies who lack access to traditional credit products and need same-day or next-day funding. The critical caveat is that payday and short-term installment loans are high-cost financial products; consumers should compare rates and fees against alternatives and carefully review repayment obligations, as the website does not transparently disclose APR rates upfront.
services: Installment loans ($100-$1,000, longer terms with equal payments, online and in-store)
Check cashing (no bank account required with valid ID)
Bill payment services (rent, utilities, credit cards)
MoneyGram money transfers (domestic and international to 200+ countries)
Porte prepaid banking account with mobile app
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
